text: I feel a heightened sense of curiosity in this thoughtfully designed space. The pristine glass walls and calm, organized environment suggest a place of learning or innovation. As I move towards the R+D display, I feel intellectually stimulated and inspired. The emphasis on development, research, and the human relationship with technology makes me contemplative—how do we shape our tools and, in turn, how do they shape us? This setting invites reflection and investigation, energizing my philosophical mind.
